prompt: I need a shopping cart feature for my React e-commerce app. Show a product grid that fetches from `/api/products` with category filtering, an add-to-cart button on each product, and a cart sidebar showing items with quantity controls and a total. TypeScript, include stores and hooks.

assertions.text: No bare useStore() — all store access uses selectors like useStore((s) => s.field)
Product data fetched via useQuery, not useState+useEffect+fetch
Mutations use useMutation with onSuccess invalidation (if applicable)
Query keys follow [domain, action, params] pattern
Cart total computed in a selector, not stored as a separate state field
Cart store includes a reset() method
Products in TanStack Query cache, cart state in Zustand — not both in the same store
Interactive elements (buttons, quantity controls) have data-testid attributes
